articles.title: Lonely people have worse memory but don’t decline faster, study finds

articles.title: Ultra-Processed Foods Erodes Visual Attention
articles.excerpt: A new study links ultra-processed foods to cognitive decline in attention and processing speed, identifying processing chemicals as a major threat to brain health.

articles.title: Why Feeling Good is Harder than Not Feeling Bad
